ai-copilot.label: AI & Copilot
ai-copilot.description: Chat modes, prompt engineering, custom instructions, context management, tool use. Learners practice mode selection, prompt structure, and drift avoidance.

codex.label: Codex Productivity
codex.description: Workflow orientation, handoff fluency, context synthesis, targeted AI use, bounded automation, Codex loop mastery (Pull → Summarize → Identify → Execute → Record).

pyramid.label: Pyramid Platform
pyramid.description: Model logic, deployment sequencing, QC, security, artifact movement, reviewer access. Learners build deployment checklists and QC evidence packs.

bi-judgment.label: BI Judgment
bi-judgment.description: Business reasoning, metric definition, grain, validation, trusted delivery, tool-agnostic thinking. Learners articulate business questions and validate metrics.

data-lineage.label: Data & Lineage
data-lineage.description: Source-to-model lineage, aggregation, rollups, snapshots, dependency mapping, row ownership. Learners trace dependencies and map data flows.

delivery-handoff.label: Delivery & Handoff
delivery-handoff.description: Change isolation, review packages, handoff drafting, reusable assets, reviewer readiness. Learners prepare change charters and review packages.

readiness.label: Retention & Readiness
readiness.description: Weekly retention checks, scorecards, proof tasks, Codex Gate, readiness classification. Learners self-assess across all tracks and track progress.

1.label: Foundation
1.subtitle: For complete amateurs — no prior experience needed. Learn vocabulary and basic concepts with maximum guidance.

2.label: Development
2.subtitle: For learners with some experience — build competence through guided application and practice.

3.label: Operational
3.subtitle: For confident practitioners — deep concepts with significant independence and quality focus.

4.label: Mastery
4.subtitle: For expert-ready learners — advanced optimization, automation, and strategic thinking with full autonomy.

ai-copilot.description: What is an AI coding assistant? Learn to chat, ask simple questions, and understand basic responses. No prior experience needed — just curiosity.

codex.description: Introduction to the Codex workflow. Learn what the Codex Loop is and practice following simple guided prompts step by step.

pyramid.description: What is a data platform? Learn basic vocabulary — models, deployments, QC — and see examples of each. Build awareness of the analytics ecosystem.

bi-judgment.description: What is business intelligence? Learn to identify simple business questions and understand what metrics are at a basic level.

data-lineage.description: What is data lineage? Learn where data comes from and where it goes. Build simple dependency awareness and follow data flows.

delivery-handoff.description: What does it mean to deliver work? Learn about change tracking, review concepts, and why communication matters.

readiness.description: How do we track learning? Learn about progress tracking, simple check-ins, and basic self-assessment of your own work.

ai-copilot.description: Choose the right chat mode for the task. Write clear, structured prompts. Understand context management basics and when to use each tool.

codex.description: Practice the Codex Loop with real tasks. Learn handoff extraction, context pull techniques, and bounded prompt design for safe automation.

pyramid.description: Build deployment checklists. Practice preflight checks before releases. Learn artifact migration basics between environments.

bi-judgment.description: Articulate clear business questions. Select appropriate metrics for each scenario. Start validating data outputs against expectations.

data-lineage.description: Trace dependencies from source to model. Identify row ownership patterns. Understand basic deduplication and its importance.

delivery-handoff.description: Scope clean change slices for review. Prepare review packages with change context. Generate handoff notes that reviewers can act on.

readiness.description: Track progress across all learning tracks. Practice accurate self-assessment. Complete proof tasks and build gate awareness.

ai-copilot.description: Create instruction files and prompt files for consistent results. Manage context across long sessions. Detect and avoid prompt drift.

codex.description: Master the Codex Loop unassisted in under 5 minutes. Apply quality rubrics to handoffs. Evaluate manual vs Codex approaches systematically.

pyramid.description: Execute QC independently with full evidence packs. Manage access policies and roles. Set up reviewer paths for smooth handoffs.

bi-judgment.description: Define grain, filters, and exclusions precisely. Produce validation evidence that stands up to scrutiny. Select optimal output types confidently.

data-lineage.description: Apply deduplication logic correctly. Define aggregation boundaries and understand their impact. Identify and mitigate double-counting risks.

delivery-handoff.description: Generate professional handoff notes that pass quality rubrics. Create reusable assets (prompts, checklists, templates). Set up reviewer workflows.

readiness.description: Track proof tasks rigorously to completion. Evaluate gate readiness against all criteria. Drive your own progress independently.

ai-copilot.description: Design custom agent workflows and sophisticated prompt systems. Optimize team-wide AI usage patterns. Define AI strategy and best practices.

codex.description: Automate Codex workflows end to end. Optimize the loop for speed and quality. Teach others. Design evaluation frameworks for Codex proficiency.

pyramid.description: Own the full deployment pipeline end to end. Design security architecture. Define platform strategy and automation roadmaps.

bi-judgment.description: Design strategic metrics that drive decisions. Validate insights across domains and systems. Deliver trusted BI independently with executive-ready communication.

data-lineage.description: Design data architecture for lineage transparency. Automate lineage tracking and dependency management. Implement quality monitoring systems.

delivery-handoff.description: Design review programs and quality standards. Manage asset libraries for team reuse. Drive process improvement through metrics and feedback.

readiness.description: Evaluate program-level effectiveness. Improve the curriculum based on outcomes. Mentor others through their readiness journey. Drive quality assurance.

vscode.name: VS Code or Markdown editor
vscode.required_for: Viewing .md files, daily notes, evidence, reports

markdown_support.name: Markdown file support

markdown.description: Training materials, daily notes, evidence, reports

recommendations: Verify you can view all curriculum documentation formats (Markdown, text, JSON) in your editor.
If environment is inadequate, submit a GitHub issue using the reviewer-environment-request.md template.
